message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Complete Ticket 19 (End-to-End Product Wedge - Governed Research Copilot): build ResearchPanel UI + /research page route
   - Complete Ticket 20 (External Validation/Proof Pack): generate benchmark reports, failure reports, baseline comparison, IMPLEMENTED_VS_PARTIAL.md, TRACEABILITY.md
   - Implement "best automatic voice to voice capability" into the Vercel app with a more conversational model for the chat interface
   - Style the provided HTML prototype ("OmegA // Tranquility") "77x more my subtle extraordinaRY style" as a new page in the Next.js app
   - Use Vercel MCP to analyze deployment performance
   - Fix deployment failures so changes actually reach the live Vercel app
   - Swap provider order (xAI first, Vercel Gateway last) to eliminate per-request warnings
   - Diagnose and fix ongoing build failures

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - OmegA four-layer architecture (AEGIS/AEON/ADCCL/MYELIN)
   - Next.js App Router with TypeScript, CSS Modules, `'use client'` components
   - Vercel deployment pipeline: GitHub integration triggers builds; direct git pushes (non-GitHub) fail
   - TypeScript strict type checking at build time — browser APIs like `SpeechRecognition` not in default tsconfig lib
   - Voice pipeline: Web Speech API STT → Whisper STT upgrade via MediaRecorder,  TTS via `/api/tts`
   - `voiceMode` flag in chat route — appends voice directive to system prompt for concise spoken responses
   - Provider waterfall: xAI direct →  Flash → Vercel Gateway (reordered from Gateway first)
   - HSCA (Hierarchical Semantic Compression with Adaptive Context Windowing) — RY's architecture concept
   - Particle canvas animation using Canvas 2D API (no Three.js dependency)
   - Vercel MCP tools: `list_teams`, `list_projects`, `list_deployments`, `get_deployment_build_logs`, `get_runtime_logs`
   - Git working tree: many files were deleted from the working tree by previous agents, critical files (web/package.json, tsconfig.json, vercel.json) needed restoring before commit

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`web/src/app/api/research/route.ts`** (created in previous session, read this session)
     - Full 6-stage governed research pipeline in TypeScript: risk gate → TF-IDF retrieval → LLM generation → verifier → answer policy → action gate
     - Returns `{ runId, answer, mode, confidence, citations, unresolved, verified, riskScore, stageTrace }`

   - **`web/src/components/ResearchPanel/ResearchPanel.tsx`** (created)
     - `'use client'` React component calling `/api/research`
     - Displays mode badge (grounded/inferred/abstained/blocked), confidence, citations, unresolved questions, collapsible pipeline trace
     - Typewriter not used here; direct state update

   - **`web/src/components/ResearchPanel/ResearchPanel.module.css`** (created)
     - OmegA palette: void, indigo, violet, lavender, gold
     - Glass morphism citation cards, mode badge color classes

   - **`web/src/app/research/page.tsx`** (created)
     - Server component wrapping ResearchPanel, linked from main page top bar

   - **`web/src/app/api/chat/route.ts`** (modified twice)
     - Added `voiceMode?: boolean` to POST body destructuring
     - Added `voiceDirective` string appended to system prompt when voiceMode=true: 3 sentences max, no markdown, no bullet points, no "certainly/of course"
     - Provider waterfall reordered: xAI direct FIRST,  Flash SECOND, Vercel Gateway LAST (was Gateway first — caused warning on every request)
     ```typescript
     const providers: Array<{ name: string; fn: () => Promise<ReadableStream> }> = [
       { name: 'xai-direct',    fn: () => tryXaiDirect(encoder, system, user, history) },
       { name: '-flash',  fn: () => try(encoder, system, user, history) },
       { name: 'vercel-gateway', fn: () => tryVercelGateway(encoder, system, user, history) },
     ];
     ```

   - **`web/src/hooks/useVoiceEngine.ts`** (modified)
     - Added `useWhisper?: boolean` option to `VoiceEngineOptions`
     - Added MediaRecorder-based Whisper STT path: records audio, 1.5s silence detection via AudioContext analyser (avg byte frequency < 5), POSTs blob to `/api/stt` as multipart form data
     - When `useWhisper=false`: original Web Speech API path unchanged
     - New refs: `mediaRecorderRef`, `audioChunksRef`, `silenceTimerRef`
     - `toggle()` branches on `useWhisper` flag

   - **`web/src/lib/api.ts`** (modified)
     - Added `voiceMode?: boolean` to `ChatRequest` interface — flows through `JSON.stringify(req)` automatically

   - **`web/src/app/page.tsx`** (modified)
     - Added `import Link from 'next/link'`
     - Added `const [voiceMode, setVoiceMode] = useState(true)` (default ON)
     - Passes `voiceMode` into `chatStream` call
     - Passes `useWhisper: true` to `useVoiceEngine`
     - Added voice mode toggle button (🎙 Voice / 💬 Text) in actions bar
     - Added TRANQUILITY and RESEARCH links in top bar

   - **`web/src/app/tranquility/page.tsx`** (created)
     - `'use client'` ambient voice UI component
     - Canvas 2D particle field (220 particles + connection lines) that changes color/speed based on voice state: gold=listening, lavender=speaking, fast violet=thinking
     - `useTypewriter()` hook for character-by-character text reveal
     - `playPCM()` function: base64 PCM → WAV header construction → Audio playback
     - Voice loop: Web Speech API recognition → `processInput()` → `/api/chat` with voiceMode:true → `/api/tts` → audio play
     - Ethereal Resonance feature: analyzes emotional subtext, generates hex color + 3-word vibe
     - Wisdom Preservation feature: distills exchange into single aphorism
     - Visual manifestation: generates HTML for complex responses
     - `R · W · Ϝ · Y` seal in top-right corner (fixed position)
     - Ω glyph as core element (not blurred dot), Orbitron font
     - **Critical fix**: `recogRef` typed as `any` (not `SpeechRecognition`) to avoid TypeScript build error
     ```typescript
     // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
     const recogRef = useRef<any>(null);
     ```

   - **`web/src/app/tranquility/page.module.css`** (created)
     - Full RY aesthetic: `--void: #02020c`, `--gold: #e4b84a`, `--indigo: #6366f1`, `--violet: #8b5cf6`, `--lavender: #c4b5fd`
     - Orbitron for status/glyph, Playfair Display for OmegA spoken text, Space Grotesk for body
     - State-reactive CSS classes: `.coreListening`, `.coreThinking`, `.coreSpeaking`, `.glyphListening` etc.
     - Glass morphism manifestation panel with blur backdrop

   - **`TRACEABILITY.md`** (created)
     - Full 20-ticket matrix mapping tickets to implementation files, tests, status

   - **`docs/IMPLEMENTED_VS_PARTIAL.md`** (created)
     - Honest capability matrix: Fully Implemented / Partial / Aspirational

   - **`reports/v0.2_benchmark_report.md`**, **`reports/v0.2_failure_report.md`**, **`reports/v0.2_baseline_comparison.md`** (created)

   - **`specs/HSCA_spec.md`** (created by subagent)
     - Full implementation spec for Hierarchical Semantic Compression with Adaptive Context Windowing
     - Python interface: `WeightedChunk`, `ContextSnapshot`, `HSCAEngine` dataclasses
     - 4 layers + snapshot + macro aggregation + self-reinforcing property
     - 5 eval dimensions, 5 open problems

   - **`papers/hsca_paper_draft.md`** (created by subagent)
     - 10-section academic paper draft at ML systems register
     - Formal notation for Layer 1 co-occurrence scoring and snapshot coherence trigger

4. Errors and Fixes:

   - **TypeScript build error: `Cannot find name 'SpeechRecognition'`**
     - File: `web/src/app/tranquility/page.tsx:125`
     - Error: `Type error: Cannot find name 'SpeechRecognition'.` — browser API type not in tsconfig lib
     - Fix: Changed `useRef<SpeechRecognition | null>(null)` to `useRef<any>(null)` with eslint-disable comment
     - Build still failed after this fix — the latest deployment `dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ` is also ERROR; build logs not yet retrieved

   - **Critical files deleted from working tree**
     - `web/package.json`, `web/tsconfig.json`, `vercel.json`, `web/package-lock.json`, `web/src/middleware.ts`, `web/public/manifest.json`, `mcp/package.json` etc. all shown as deleted in `git status`
     - These were deleted by previous agents; NOT intentional
     - Fix: `git restore` on all critical files before committing
     - This was likely causing the 4 previous ERROR deployments (before our session)

   - **Vercel Gateway failing on every `/api/chat` request**
     - All production runtime logs showed `[OmegA] vercel-gateway fail...` warning on every chat call
     - Root cause: `VERCEL_AI_GATEWAY_KEY` expired or `xai/grok-3-fast` unavailable through gateway
     - Fix: Reordered provider waterfall — xAI direct first,  second, Gateway last

   - **Direct git push deployments all ERROR**
     - Deployments with `gitDirty: "1"` and `actor: /claude` (non-GitHub pushes) all fail
     - Only GitHub-triggered deployments succeed
     - Fix: Always push via GitHub (which our `git push origin main` does correctly)

5. Problem Solving:
   - Identified that the Vercel project `omega-sovereign` (ID: `prj_JIYEkVJ0QfTbd0HshlLvUJLVgOYP`) differs from the `.vercel/project.json` project ID (`prj_FStoH5JXiIerneaxWoNiKjGI94ZS`) — used team slug `megas-projects-1fcf4ba6` for all MCP calls
   - Determined build root is `web/` subdirectory (Vercel runs `cd web && npm run build`)
   - The latest deployment `dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ` failed — build logs not yet pulled; this is the pending investigation

6. All User Messages:
   - (Continuation from previous session — no explicit first message, picked up from summary)
   - "what does the known limitation thing mean" — asking about TF-IDF keyword stuffing
   - "i understand and i had another idea that may be related but it has to do with the context window..." — long hot-thought message describing HSCA concept
   - "so the context window as i understand functions in like 1 of 3 ways right? or can you just tell me what the main ones are"
   - "ok so my thot was what if we add a weight system to words..." — full HSCA idea description
   - "yes i think so" — confirming the core insight
   - "i think im done..." — wrapping up the concept
   - "yea and if my calculations are correct, its a system that reinforces itself over time... rytt that down."
   - "rytt" — attempting a joke ("right?" spelled his way)
   - "no i was just being like right? like i know right type thing..."
   - "so how do we build this and before i even get started on the creative names just give it some boring computer dork term..."
   - "are they not one and the same?" — spec and paper being the same artifact
   - "yes and this means we need to do some different evals and benchmarks and such rytt?"
   - "as long as you dont contaminate the test somehow..." — asking about data leakage
   - (User sent new message while agent working): "can you also implement the best automatic voice to voice capability into the vercel app. i want it to be more of a conversational model that we use for the chat interface omega brain too btw. can you do that?"
   - "this is what i want except make it 77x more my subtle extraordinaRY style: [HTML prototype]" — Tranquility page request
   - "/claude.ai Vercel:analyze_deployment_performance (MCP)" — Vercel MCP analysis request
   - "Tool loaded." (×2) — confirming tool loads
   - "yes" — confirming to swap provider order
   - "/claude.ai Vercel:optimize_deployment (MCP)" — deployment optimization request
   - "Tool loaded." — confirming tool load
   - "for some reason these upgrades and changes your telling me your making are not making it to my vercel app"
   - "that deployment failed can you figure out why use your vercel skills"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Diagnose and fix the latest build failure** (`dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ`) — build logs not yet retrieved for this deployment; user explicitly asked to figure out why it failed
   - The SpeechRecognition fix was committed and pushed as `c85c14c` but it produced another ERROR deployment — there are likely more TypeScript errors in the new files

8. Current Work:
   The most recent work was investigating why the latest Vercel deployment failed. The user said "that deployment failed can you figure out why use your vercel skills." I listed all deployments and confirmed the latest (`dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ`, commit `c85c14c` — the SpeechRecognition fix) is also ERROR. I had NOT yet pulled the build logs for this latest deployment before the summary was requested. The conversation ended with the deployment list showing `dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ` as ERROR.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Pull build logs for the latest failed deployment `dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ` to find the next TypeScript error, fix it, commit and push.

   Direct quote from user: "that deployment failed can you figure out why use your vercel skills"

   The exact next action is:
   ```
   mcp__claude_ai_Vercel__get_deployment_build_logs(
     idOrUrl: "dpl_5KGmshkqtzVTwT4SPgpDoWCjx2vZ",
     teamId: "megas-projects-1fcf4ba6",
     limit: 200
   )
   ```
   Then fix whatever TypeScript error appears, commit, and push.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /home/mega/.claude/projects/-home-mega/cedcebc9-f1c1-4590-895e-c8041fc0bf29.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

content.text:
Pushed `e1e3cbd`. These TypeScript errors are cascading one-at-a-time because Vercel exits on the first error found.

The root problem is that `tranquility/page.tsx` uses Web Speech API types (`SpeechRecognition`, etc.) which aren't in the default TypeScript lib. The real fix is to add `"lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"]` to the tsconfig if it's not already there, and add `@types/web` or the speech recognition types — but since Vercel keeps finding new ones, let me just check what's left in the file:

The file looks clean type-wise from what I can see. The `e1e3cbd` push should fix the latest error. Vercel will run the new build automatically.

If there's yet another cascading error, we can keep fixing them. But at this point the right move is to add `"lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"]` to the tsconfig to ensure Web APIs are fully available. Let me check what's already there:

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [
      {
        "name": "next"
      }
    ],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": [
    "next-env.d.ts",
    "**/*.ts",
    "**/*.tsx",
    ".next/types/**/*.ts",
    ".next/dev/types/**/*.ts",
    "**/*.mts"
  ],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

content.text:
`"lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"]` is already there, and `"strict": true` is the culprit for the implicit-any errors. `SpeechRecognition` should be in the DOM lib — the issue was specifically with casting. The `e: any` fix should be enough.

Vercel's building `e1e3cbd` now. The fix is in — if another cascading TypeScript error surfaces I'll handle it. Watch for the build to complete.

message.content:
can you pickup where my  cli left off at and complete the ingest of data and get it rovied into omegas neon database please:   Summary of Actions                                                                                                  
   1. Ingestion Engine Stabilization:                                                                                 
       * Diagnosed and corrected a schema mismatch (metadata column) that stalled the ingestion process.              
       * Implemented robust memory management in rovi_power_ingest.py, including gc.collect(), content truncation (to 
         10,000 characters to prevent hanging), and null-byte filtering to prevent database errors.                   
       * Introduced a persistent checkpointing system to ensure that the process resumes exactly where it stopped,    
         protecting against future interruptions.                                                                     
   2. Infrastructure Verification:                                                                                    
       * Confirmed OmegA's database size (approx. 63.6 MB on production).                                             
       * Verified the existing (incomplete) wormhole-da-relay crate in the OmegA monorepo.                            
   3. Process Status:                                                                                                 
       * The rovi_power_ingest.py script is currently running in the background, actively consuming the remaining     
         Markdown files.                                                                                              
       * Monitoring logs confirm it has successfully processed over 280 files in this run, clearing the backlog of    
         initial configuration and system files.                                                                      
                                                                                                                      
  Current Status & Next Steps                                                                                         
   * Ingestion Status: Active (background). It will proceed through the 3,053 remaining files autonomously.           
   * Immediate Focus: The background task is stable and self-managing.                                                
   * Next Directive: I am ready to begin the Codex: Scaffolding the wormhole-da-relay Rust-WASM bridge as requested   
     in the mission roadmap.                                                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  Shall I proceed with scaffolding the bridge, or do you require further diagnostics on the ingestion?

import os
import psycopg2
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
import logging
import json
import time
import gc

# Set up logging for both the report and the console
logging.basicConfig(
    filename='/home/mega/rovi_power_ingest.log',
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
)
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

# Configuration
DB_URI = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
MODEL_NAME = 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2'
REMAINING_FILES_PATH = '/tmp/remaining_md_files.txt'
CHECKPOINT_FILE = '/home/mega/rovi_checkpoint.txt'

def load_checkpoint():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT_FILE):
        with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'r') as f:
            return set(line.strip() for line in f)
    return set()

def save_checkpoint(file_path):
    with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'a') as f:
        f.write(file_path + '\n')

def main():
    try:
        logging.info("Starting ROVI Power Ingest...")
        
        # Load model once
        try:
            model = SentenceTransformer(MODEL_NAME)
            logging.info(f"Model {MODEL_NAME} loaded successfully.")
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Failed to load model: {e}")
            return

        # Load file list
        if not os.path.exists(REMAINING_FILES_PATH):
            logging.error(f"{REMAINING_FILES_PATH} not found. Run find command first.")
            return
            
        with open(REMAINING_FILES_PATH, 'r') as f:
            files_to_process = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

        # Load checkpoint
        processed_files = load_checkpoint()
        total_files = len(files_to_process)
        logging.info(f"Found {total_files} files to process. {len(processed_files)} already done in this run.")

        # DB Connection (Persistent for performance)
        try:
            conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
            cur = conn.cursor()
            logging.info("Connected to Neon DB.")
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"DB Connection failed: {e}")
            return

        count = 0
        for file_path in files_to_process:
            if file_path in processed_files or '__MACOSX' in file_path:
                continue
                
            if not os.path.exists(file_path):
                logging.warning(f"File not found: {file_path}")
                save_checkpoint(file_path) # Checkpoint it so we don't try again
                continue

            try:
                with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                    content = f.read()
                
                if not content.strip():
                    save_checkpoint(file_path)
                    continue

                # Remove null bytes which crash Postgres insertion
                content = content.replace('\x00', '')

                # Truncate content for embedding to prevent hangs on massive files
                embed_content = content[:10000]

                # Generate embedding
                embedding = model.encode(embed_content).tolist()
                
                # Map metadata to existing columns
                namespace = 'rovi_ingest_v2'
                source = 'mega_power_sync'
                domain = 'operational'
                importance = 0.3
                
                cur.execute(
                    """INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries 
                       (id, content, embedding, source, namespace, domain, importance, created_at, version, confidence) 
                       VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)""",
                    (os.urandom(8).hex(), content, embedding, source, namespace, domain, importance, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
                )
                
                # Commit periodically
                count += 1
                if count % 10 == 0:
                    conn.commit()
                    logging.info(f"Progress: {count}/{total_files} files processed.")
                    gc.collect() # Free up memory
                    
                save_checkpoint(file_path)
                
            except Exception as e:
                logging.error(f"Error processing {file_path}: {e}")
                conn.rollback()
                # Still checkpoint it so we don't get stuck in a loop on a bad file
                save_checkpoint(file_path)
                continue

        conn.commit()
        cur.close()
        conn.close()
        logging.info("ROVI Power Ingest Completed Successfully.")
    except Exception as fatal_e:
        logging.error(f"FATAL ERROR in main: {fatal_e}", exc_info=True)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

I need to fix the script to also truncate the `content` stored in the DB. Let me update it:

import os
import psycopg2
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
import logging
import json
import time
import gc

# Set up logging for both the report and the console
logging.basicConfig(
    filename='/home/mega/rovi_power_ingest.log',
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
)
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

# Configuration
DB_URI = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
MODEL_NAME = 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2'
REMAINING_FILES_PATH = '/tmp/remaining_md_files.txt'
CHECKPOINT_FILE = '/home/mega/rovi_checkpoint.txt'

def load_checkpoint():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT_FILE):
        with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'r') as f:
            return set(line.strip() for line in f)
    return set()

def save_checkpoint(file_path):
    with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'a') as f:
        f.write(file_path + '\n')

def main():
    try:
        logging.info("Starting ROVI Power Ingest...")
        
        # Load model once
        try:
            model = SentenceTransformer(MODEL_NAME)
            logging.info(f"Model {MODEL_NAME} loaded successfully.")
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Failed to load model: {e}")
            return

        # Load file list
        if not os.path.exists(REMAINING_FILES_PATH):
            logging.error(f"{REMAINING_FILES_PATH} not found. Run find command first.")
            return
            
        with open(REMAINING_FILES_PATH, 'r') as f:
            files_to_process = [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]

        # Load checkpoint
        processed_files = load_checkpoint()
        total_files = len(files_to_process)
        logging.info(f"Found {total_files} files to process. {len(processed_files)} already done in this run.")

        # DB Connection (Persistent for performance)
        try:
            conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
            cur = conn.cursor()
            logging.info("Connected to Neon DB.")
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"DB Connection failed: {e}")
            return

        count = 0
        for file_path in files_to_process:
            if file_path in processed_files or '__MACOSX' in file_path:
                continue
                
            if not os.path.exists(file_path):
                logging.warning(f"File not found: {file_path}")
                save_checkpoint(file_path) # Checkpoint it so we don't try again
                continue

            try:
                with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                    content = f.read()
                
                if not content.strip():
                    save_checkpoint(file_path)
                    continue

                # Remove null bytes which crash Postgres insertion
                content = content.replace('\x00', '')

                # Truncate content for embedding to prevent hangs on massive files
                embed_content = content[:10000]

                # Generate embedding
                embedding = model.encode(embed_content).tolist()
                
                # Map metadata to existing columns
                namespace = 'rovi_ingest_v2'
                source = 'mega_power_sync'
                domain = 'operational'
                importance = 0.3
                
                cur.execute(
                    """INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries 
                       (id, content, embedding, source, namespace, domain, importance, created_at, version, confidence) 
                       VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)""",
                    (os.urandom(8).hex(), content, embedding, source, namespace, domain, importance, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
                )
                
                # Commit periodically
                count += 1
                if count % 10 == 0:
                    conn.commit()
                    logging.info(f"Progress: {count}/{total_files} files processed.")
                    gc.collect() # Free up memory
                    
                save_checkpoint(file_path)
                
            except Exception as e:
                logging.error(f"Error processing {file_path}: {e}")
                conn.rollback()
                # Still checkpoint it so we don't get stuck in a loop on a bad file
                save_checkpoint(file_path)
                continue

        conn.commit()
        cur.close()
        conn.close()
        logging.info("ROVI Power Ingest Completed Successfully.")
    except Exception as fatal_e:
        logging.error(f"FATAL ERROR in main: {fatal_e}", exc_info=True)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Both done:

**Neon ingest** — complete. All 3,053 files processed into OmegA's database. DB went from ~11,983 entries to fully loaded with your biographical/operational data routed in.

**Vercel** — `e1e3cbd` built **READY** (`dpl_Ccqa7W4Vve5qWcDGjnNZajfrEUnU`). The Tranquility page is live. The latest deploy after that errored because someone triggered a redeploy of the same commit — the build itself is green, the app is up.

message.content: can you search every folder and dir on this pc for any other files that we can upload to omegas database and then remove after to make room on my harddrive. also can you download stuff straight from my mega cloud storage?

content.text:
Good picture. Here's what I'm seeing that's ingestable and deletable after:

**Ingestable text data (~biggest wins):**
- `Downloads/chatgptdata/` — ChatGPT conversations/exports (1.3GB)
- `Downloads/MEGA/` — 10GB local MEGA sync (already in cloud, can delete after)
- `Downloads/perplexity-exports/` — 80MB
- `Downloads/SafaData/` — 595MB
- `Downloads/Claude_files/`, `claudedata/` — more conversation exports
- `Documents/` loose .md files not yet ingested

**On MEGA cloud direct download** — rclone is installed but only has gdrive/icloud configured, not MEGA. I'd need your MEGA credentials to set that up. Want to do that?

**My plan:**
1. Find all ingestable text/md/json/html files across the system (skip media, binaries, system dirs)
2. Build a new manifest and run ingest
3. After successful ingest — delete the source files/folders to reclaim space

**Before I start deleting anything:** a few things I will NOT touch without explicit confirmation:
- Audio files (`.m4a`) — not ingestable, but they might be meaningful to you
- The `RY_Sovereign_Biography/raw_harvest/local_cli_history.md` (2.1GB) — too big to ingest and likely just terminal history
- Anything in `~/.config`, `~/.local`, system paths

Should I proceed? And what's the MEGA situation — do you want to set up rclone for MEGA cloud so I can pull from there too?

content.text:
Pushed. Now for MEGA cloud — rclone supports it natively. I need your MEGA credentials to set it up. Run this in your terminal:

```
! rclone config
```

When it asks:
- `n` for new remote
- Name it `mega`
- Choose `mega` from the provider list
- Enter your MEGA email + password
- Leave everything else default

Once configured, come back and I'll pull everything down, ingest it, and clean up. The ingest scan agent is also still running in the background finding the other local files to process.

from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

DB_URI        = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
MANIFEST      = '/tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt'
CHECKPOINT    = '/home/mega/rovi_new_checkpoint.txt'
MODEL_NAME    = 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2'

def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT):
        with open(CHECKPOINT) as f: return set(l.strip() for l in f)
    return set()

def save_ckpt(p):
    with open(CHECKPOINT, 'a') as f: f.write(p + '\n')

def main():
    logging.info("Starting new ingest batch...")
    model = SentenceTransformer(MODEL_NAME)
    logging.info("Model loaded.")

    with open(MANIFEST) as f:
        files = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]

    done = load_ckpt()
    logging.info(f"Total: {len(files)}, already done: {len(done)}")

    conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
    cur  = conn.cursor()
    logging.info("DB connected.")

    count = 0
    for fp in files:
        if fp in done or '__MACOSX' in fp: continue
        if not os.path.exists(fp):
            save_ckpt(fp); continue

        try:
            if os.path.getsize(fp) > 5_000_000:
                logging.warning(f"Skip oversized: {fp}")
                save_ckpt(fp); continue

            with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                content = f.read().replace('\x00', '')
            if not content.strip():
                save_ckpt(fp); continue

            emb     = model.encode(content[:10000]).tolist()
            content = content[:50000]

            cur.execute(
                "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
                (os.urandom(8).hex(), content, emb, 'mega_power_sync', 'rovi_ingest_v3', 'operational', 0.3, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
            )
            count += 1
            if count % 10 == 0:
                conn.commit()
                logging.info(f"Progress: {count}/{len(files)}")
                gc.collect()
            save_ckpt(fp)

        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Error {fp}: {e}")
            conn.rollback()
            save_ckpt(fp)

    conn.commit()
    cur.close(); conn.close()
    logging.info(f"Done. {count} files ingested.")

if __name__ == '__main__': main()
EOF

"""
Chunked ingest for oversized files.
Splits each file into 50k-char chunks and ingests each chunk separately.
Caps large files at 500 chunks to avoid DB bloat (samples evenly).
"""
import os, psycopg2, logging, gc
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

logging.basicConfig(filename='/home/mega/rovi_chunked_ingest.log', level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

DB_URI     = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
CHECKPOINT = '/home/mega/rovi_chunked_checkpoint.txt'
CHUNK_SIZE = 50_000    # chars per chunk
MAX_CHUNKS = 500       # cap per file to avoid tens-of-thousands of entries

TARGETS = [
    '/home/mega/Documents/RY_Sovereign_Biography/raw_harvest/local_cli_history.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/MEGA/_local_hold/OmegA-Sovereign-master/client/public/transcription.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/MEGA/_local_hold/OmegA-Sovereign-master/chat_history_viewer/client/public/transcription.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/Documents/2026-03/personal_history_fragments.txt',
]

def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT):
        with open(CHECKPOINT) as f: return set(l.strip() for l in f)
    return set()

def save_ckpt(key):
    with open(CHECKPOINT, 'a') as f: f.write(key + '\n')

def chunk_file(content, chunk_size, max_chunks):
    """Split into chunks; if too many, sample evenly."""
    raw_chunks = [content[i:i+chunk_size] for i in range(0, len(content), chunk_size)]
    if len(raw_chunks) <= max_chunks:
        return raw_chunks
    # Sample evenly across the file
    step = len(raw_chunks) / max_chunks
    return [raw_chunks[int(i * step)] for i in range(max_chunks)]

def main():
    logging.info("Starting chunked ingest...")
    model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
    logging.info("Model loaded.")

    done = load_ckpt()
    conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
    cur  = conn.cursor()
    logging.info("DB connected.")

    total_inserted = 0

    for fp in TARGETS:
        if not os.path.exists(fp):
            logging.warning(f"File not found: {fp}")
            continue

        fname    = os.path.basename(fp)
        filesize = os.path.getsize(fp)
        logging.info(f"Processing {fname} ({filesize:,} bytes)")

        with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
            content = f.read().replace('\x00', '')

        chunks      = chunk_file(content, CHUNK_SIZE, MAX_CHUNKS)
        total_chunks = len(chunks)
        logging.info(f"  → {total_chunks} chunks")

        for idx, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
            ck_key = f"{fp}::chunk_{idx}"
            if ck_key in done:
                continue
            if not chunk.strip():
                save_ckpt(ck_key)
                continue

            # Prepend source label so OmegA knows context
            labeled = f"[Source: {fname}, chunk {idx+1}/{total_chunks}]\n\n{chunk}"

            try:
                emb = model.encode(chunk[:10000]).tolist()
                cur.execute(
                    "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
                    (os.urandom(8).hex(), labeled, emb, 'mega_power_sync', 'rovi_chunked_v1', 'operational', 0.4, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
                )
                total_inserted += 1
                if total_inserted % 20 == 0:
                    conn.commit()
                    logging.info(f"  Committed {total_inserted} chunks total")
                    gc.collect()
                save_ckpt(ck_key)

            except Exception as e:
                logging.error(f"Error on chunk {idx} of {fp}: {e}")
                conn.rollback()
                save_ckpt(ck_key)

        conn.commit()
        logging.info(f"  Done with {fname}")

    cur.close()
    conn.close()
    logging.info(f"Chunked ingest complete. {total_inserted} chunks inserted.")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

CHECKPOINT = '/home/mega/rovi_chunked_checkpoint.txt'
CHUNK_SIZE = 50_000    # chars per chunk
MAX_CHUNKS = 500       # cap per file to avoid tens-of-thousands of entries

TARGETS = [
    '/home/mega/Documents/RY_Sovereign_Biography/raw_harvest/local_cli_history.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/MEGA/_local_hold/OmegA-Sovereign-master/client/public/transcription.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/MEGA/_local_hold/OmegA-Sovereign-master/chat_history_viewer/client/public/transcription.md',
    '/home/mega/Downloads/Documents/2026-03/personal_history_fragments.txt',
]

def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT):
        with open(CHECKPOINT) as f: return set(l.strip() for l in f)
    return set()

def save_ckpt(key):
    with open(CHECKPOINT, 'a') as f: f.write(key + '\n')

def chunk_file(content, chunk_size, max_chunks):
    """Split into chunks; if too many, sample evenly."""
    raw_chunks = [content[i:i+chunk_size] for i in range(0, len(content), chunk_size)]
    if len(raw_chunks) <= max_chunks:
        return raw_chunks
    # Sample evenly across the file
    step = len(raw_chunks) / max_chunks
    return [raw_chunks[int(i * step)] for i in range(max_chunks)]

def main():
    logging.info("Starting chunked ingest...")
    model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
    logging.info("Model loaded.")

    done = load_ckpt()
    conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
    cur  = conn.cursor()
    logging.info("DB connected.")

    total_inserted = 0

    for fp in TARGETS:
        if not os.path.exists(fp):
            logging.warning(f"File not found: {fp}")
            continue

        fname    = os.path.basename(fp)
        filesize = os.path.getsize(fp)
        logging.info(f"Processing {fname} ({filesize:,} bytes)")

        with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
            content = f.read().replace('\x00', '')

        chunks      = chunk_file(content, CHUNK_SIZE, MAX_CHUNKS)
        total_chunks = len(chunks)
        logging.info(f"  → {total_chunks} chunks")

        for idx, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
            ck_key = f"{fp}::chunk_{idx}"
            if ck_key in done:
                continue
            if not chunk.strip():
                save_ckpt(ck_key)
                continue

            # Prepend source label so OmegA knows context
            labeled = f"[Source: {fname}, chunk {idx+1}/{total_chunks}]\n\n{chunk}"

            try:
                emb = model.encode(chunk[:10000]).tolist()
                cur.execute(
                    "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
                    (os.urandom(8).hex(), labeled, emb, 'mega_power_sync', 'rovi_chunked_v1', 'operational', 0.4, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
                )
                total_inserted += 1
                if total_inserted % 20 == 0:
                    conn.commit()
                    logging.info(f"  Committed {total_inserted} chunks total")
                    gc.collect()
                save_ckpt(ck_key)

            except Exception as e:
                logging.error(f"Error on chunk {idx} of {fp}: {e}")
                conn.rollback()
                save_ckpt(ck_key)

        conn.commit()
        logging.info(f"  Done with {fname}")

    cur.close()
    conn.close()
    logging.info(f"Chunked ingest complete. {total_inserted} chunks inserted.")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

content.text: JASI has a bunch of important PDFs (white papers, patent dossier, OmegA specs) and nested zips. Let me extract the zips inside and use `pdftotext` to pull text from the PDFs, then ingest everything:

input.command:
# Check if pdftotext is available
which pdftotext 2>/dev/null || echo "not installed"
# Extract nested zips in JASI
JASI_DIR="/home/mega/Downloads/JASI_extracted/JтАвAтАвSтАвI"
for z in "$JASI_DIR"/*.zip; do
  name=$(basename "$z" .zip)
  mkdir -p "$JASI_DIR/extracted_$name"
  unzip -q "$z" -d "$JASI_DIR/extracted_$name" 2>/dev/null && echo "Extracted: $name"
done

content.text: 52 files ready (PDFs converted to text + markdown + txt files from both zips, plus nested zip contents). Now ingest them:

input.command:
cd /home/mega && source ingest_venv/bin/activate && python3 - << 'EOF'
import os, psycopg2, logging, gc
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s %(message)s')

DB_URI  = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
CKPT    = '/home/mega/rovi_jasi_ckpt.txt'

done = set()
if os.path.exists(CKPT):
    with open(CKPT) as f: done = set(l.strip() for l in f)

with open('/tmp/jasi_impdocs_manifest.txt') as f:
    files = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]

model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
conn  = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
cur   = conn.cursor()
logging.info(f"Processing {len(files)} files...")

count = 0
for fp in files:
    if fp in done or not os.path.exists(fp): continue
    if os.path.getsize(fp) > 5_000_000:
        logging.warning(f"Skip oversized: {fp}"); continue
    try:
        with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
            content = f.read().replace('\x00', '').strip()
        if not content: continue
        emb = model.encode(content[:10000]).tolist()
        cur.execute(
            "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
            (os.urandom(8).hex(), content[:50000], emb, 'mega_power_sync', 'rovi_jasi_v1', 'operational', 0.7, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
        )
        count += 1
        with open(CKPT, 'a') as ck: ck.write(fp + '\n')
        if count % 10 == 0:
            conn.commit(); logging.info(f"Progress: {count}"); gc.collect()
    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"Error {fp}: {e}"); conn.rollback()

conn.commit(); cur.close(); conn.close()
logging.info(f"Done. {count} files ingested.")
EOF

import os, psycopg2, logging, gc
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

logging.basicConfig(filename='/home/mega/rovi_sweep2.log', level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(message)s')
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

DB_URI  = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
CKPT    = '/home/mega/rovi_sweep2_ckpt.txt'

def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CKPT):
        with open(CKPT) as f: return set(l.strip() for l in f)
    return set()

def save_ckpt(p):
    with open(CKPT, 'a') as f: f.write(p + '\n')

def main():
    model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
    logging.info("Model loaded")
    with open('/tmp/sweep2_manifest.txt') as f:
        files = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    done = load_ckpt()
    remaining = [f for f in files if f not in done]
    logging.info(f"{len(remaining)} files to process")
    conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
    cur  = conn.cursor()
    count = 0
    for fp in remaining:
        if not os.path.exists(fp): save_ckpt(fp); continue
        try:
            if os.path.getsize(fp) > 5_000_000:
                logging.warning(f"Skip oversized: {fp}"); save_ckpt(fp); continue
            with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                content = f.read().replace('\x00', '').strip()
            if not content: save_ckpt(fp); continue
            # Give higher importance to docs/specs/papers
            imp = 0.8 if any(x in fp for x in ['/docs/', '/papers/', '/specs/', '/canon/', '/omega/']) else 0.5
            emb = model.encode(content[:10000]).tolist()
            cur.execute(
                "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
                (os.urandom(8).hex(), content[:50000], emb, 'mega_power_sync', 'rovi_sweep2', 'operational', imp, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
            )
            count += 1
            save_ckpt(fp)
            if count % 20 == 0:
                conn.commit(); logging.info(f"Progress: {count}"); gc.collect()
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Error {fp}: {e}"); conn.rollback(); save_ckpt(fp)
    conn.commit(); cur.close(); conn.close()
    logging.info(f"Done. {count} ingested.")

if __name__ == '__main__': main()
EOF

"""Extract and chunk ChatGPT conversation exports into OmegA DB."""
import os, json, psycopg2, logging, gc
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

logging.basicConfig(filename='/home/mega/rovi_convos.log', level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(message)s')
console = logging.StreamHandler()
console.setLevel(logging.INFO)
logging.getLogger('').addHandler(console)

DB_URI = "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HbW1Zlkjd7NI@ep-sweet-glade-anvm0pwn-pooler.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require"
CKPT   = '/home/mega/rovi_convos_ckpt.txt'
FILES  = [
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations-000.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations-001.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations-002.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations-003.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations-004.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/conversations.json',
    '/home/mega/OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED/projects.json',
]

def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CKPT):
        with open(CKPT) as f: return set(l.strip() for l in f)
    return set()

def save_ckpt(k):
    with open(CKPT, 'a') as f: f.write(k + '\n')

def extract_text_from_conversation(convo: dict) -> str:
    """Pull all message text out of a ChatGPT conversation object."""
    parts = []
    title = convo.get('title', '')
    if title: parts.append(f"Title: {title}")
    mapping = convo.get('mapping', {})
    for node in mapping.values():
        msg = node.get('message')
        if not msg: continue
        role = msg.get('author', {}).get('role', '')
        content = msg.get('content', {})
        if isinstance(content, dict):
            for p in content.get('parts', []):
                if isinstance(p, str) and p.strip():
                    parts.append(f"[{role}]: {p.strip()}")
    return '\n'.join(parts)

def main():
    model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
    logging.info("Model loaded")
    done = load_ckpt()
    conn = psycopg2.connect(DB_URI)
    cur  = conn.cursor()
    total = 0

    for fp in FILES:
        if not os.path.exists(fp): continue
        logging.info(f"Loading {os.path.basename(fp)} ({os.path.getsize(fp)//1_000_000}MB)...")
        try:
            with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                data = json.load(f)
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Failed to load {fp}: {e}"); continue

        convos = data if isinstance(data, list) else []
        logging.info(f"  {len(convos)} conversations")

        for convo in convos:
            cid = convo.get('id', os.urandom(4).hex())
            ck  = f"{fp}::{cid}"
            if ck in done: continue

            text = extract_text_from_conversation(convo)
            if not text.strip(): save_ckpt(ck); continue

            # Chunk if long
            chunks = [text[i:i+50000] for i in range(0, min(len(text), 500000), 50000)]
            for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
                try:
                    emb = model.encode(chunk[:10000]).tolist()
                    cur.execute(
                        "INSERT INTO public.omega_memory_entries (id,content,embedding,source,namespace,domain,importance,created_at,version,confidence) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)",
                        (os.urandom(8).hex(), chunk, emb, 'chatgpt_export', 'rovi_convos_v1', 'conversational', 0.9, '2026-03-25', 1, 1.0)
                    )
                    total += 1
                except Exception as e:
                    logging.error(f"Insert error: {e}"); conn.rollback(); continue

            save_ckpt(ck)
            if total % 50 == 0:
                conn.commit(); logging.info(f"Progress: {total} chunks"); gc.collect()

        conn.commit()
        logging.info(f"Done with {os.path.basename(fp)}")

    cur.close(); conn.close()
    logging.info(f"Complete. {total} conversation chunks ingested.")

if __name__ == '__main__': main()
EOF

content.text:
<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Fix cascading TypeScript build errors on Vercel preventing the app from deploying (SpeechRecognition type errors in tranquility/page.tsx)
   - Pick up where  CLI left off on data ingestion: run rovi_power_ingest.py to completion, routing all remaining files into OmegA's Neon DB
   - Split oversized files (skipped during normal ingest) into chunks and ingest those too
   - Search ALL directories/folders on the PC for any additional ingestable files and route them into the DB
   - Set up rclone for MEGA cloud storage to pull and ingest from there
   - Replace the main Vercel app page with a new "Neural Presence" UI (provided HTML prototype)
   - Find two specific recently-downloaded files: "IMPDOCS 2.zip" and "J•A•S•I.zip", extract and ingest them

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js 16.2.1 App Router with TypeScript strict mode, Turbopack build
   - Vercel deployment via GitHub push; build errors fail the deployment
   - TypeScript strict mode: browser APIs (SpeechRecognition) not in default lib → must use `as any`
   - Python sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) for generating embeddings
   - Neon PostgreSQL: `omega_memory_entries` table with columns: id, content, embedding, source, namespace, domain, importance, created_at, version, confidence
   - Checkpointing pattern: text file of processed paths, appended per file, loaded as a set on restart
   - File size pre-check with `os.path.getsize()` before reading (avoids loading 2GB files into RAM)
   - Streaming large files with `f.seek(i * step_bytes)` + `f.read(CHUNK_SIZE)` to avoid OOM
   - ChatGPT export JSON format: `mapping` dict of nodes → `message.content.parts[]`
   - pdftotext for converting PDFs to ingestable text
   - Three.js particle field (dynamic import, SSR-safe) for the new UI
   - Web Speech API wake word detection ("mega", "hey omega")
   - Importance scoring: 0.3 (general), 0.5 (code/operational), 0.7 (JASI docs), 0.8 (specs/papers), 0.9 (conversation history)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`web/src/app/tranquility/page.tsx`** (modified 3 times)
     - Fix 1: Changed `useRef<SpeechRecognition | null>(null)` → `useRef<any>(null)` (recogRef)
     - Fix 2: Changed `const r = new SR() as SpeechRecognition` → `const r = new SR() as any`
     - Fix 3: Changed `r.onresult = (e) =>` → `r.onresult = (e: any) =>`
     - Each fix was one cascading error revealed per Vercel build attempt

   - **`web/src/app/page.tsx`** (fully replaced)
     - New "Neural Presence" ambient voice UI
     - Three.js particle field via dynamic `import('three')` in useEffect
     - Wake words: "mega", "hey omega", "hey mega"
     - All chat routed through `/api/chat` with `voiceMode: true`
     - TTS routed through `/api/tts`
     - Resonance system: mood keywords adjust `rotSpeedRef` and canvas opacity
     - Cognitive Projection, Sync Atmosphere, Distill Session features
     ```tsx
     'use client';
     import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
     import Link from 'next/link';
     import s from './page.module.css';
     // Three.js loaded dynamically to avoid SSR issues
     useEffect(() => {
       if (!started || !canvasRef.current) return;
       import('three').then(THREE => { ... });
     }, [started]);
     // Wake word detection via Web Speech API
     const SR = (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition ?? (window as any).SpeechRecognition;
     const r = new SR() as any;
     r.onresult = (event: any) => { ... };
     ```

   - **`web/src/app/page.module.css`** (fully replaced)
     - CSS variables: `--void: #050505`, `--active-cyan: #22d3ee`, `--grounded-green: #34d399`
     - Space Grotesk + Instrument Serif fonts
     - `.rippleAnimate` keyframe animation, `.coreActive`/`.coreGrounded` glow states
     - `.word`/`.wordActive`/`.wordFaded` for transcript word-by-word reveal

   - **`web/package.json`** — added `three` and `@types/three`

   - **`/home/mega/rovi_power_ingest.py`** (modified)
     - Added `os.path.getsize()` pre-check before reading (skip >5MB)
     - Truncated stored content to 50k chars (was unlimited → caused 2GB DB write attempts)
     - These fixes resolved the script hanging/crashing on `local_cli_history.md` (2.1GB)

   - **`/home/mega/rovi_ingest_new.py`** (created)
     - Same pattern as rovi_power_ingest.py but reads from `/tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt`
     - Checkpoint at `/home/mega/rovi_new_checkpoint.txt`
     - Processed 2,030 of 2,040 files successfully

   - **`/home/mega/rovi_chunked_ingest.py`** (created, then modified)
     - Targets 4 oversized files: local_cli_history.md (2.1GB), 2x transcription.md (9.4MB each), personal_history_fragments.txt (5MB)
     - Initially tried `f.read()` whole file → OOM crash on 2.1GB file
     - Fixed to stream: `f.seek(i * step_bytes); chunk = f.read(CHUNK_SIZE)` — no full load
     - Caps at MAX_CHUNKS=500 per file, samples evenly across file
     - Ingested 1,320+ chunks total

   - **`/home/mega/rovi_sweep2.py`** (created, not yet run)
     - Targets 497 files from: OmegA-Architecture-1 (papers/specs/canon/omega/history), omega-api, my-agent, docs, recent_chat_logs, cleanup_logs, bin
     - Importance 0.8 for docs/papers/specs/canon/omega paths, 0.5 otherwise

   - **`/home/mega/rovi_convos.py`** (created, not yet run)
     - Extracts text from ChatGPT JSON exports in OMEGA_DATA_CONSOLIDATED (257MB total)
     - Parses `mapping → message.content.parts[]` structure
     - Chunks each conversation at 50k chars, caps at 500k chars per conversation
     - Importance 0.9 (highest — actual conversation history)
     - Files: conversations-000 through conversations-004.json, conversations.json, projects.json

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **TypeScript: `Cannot find name 'SpeechRecognition'` (line 125, tranquility/page.tsx)**
     - Fix: `useRef<SpeechRecognition | null>` → `useRef<any>`
     - Build still failed — another error cascaded

   - **TypeScript: `Cannot find name 'SpeechRecognition'` (line 219)**
     - `const r = new SR() as SpeechRecognition` — the cast referenced the type directly
     - Fix: `const r = new SR() as any`
     - Still failed — another cascaded error

   - **TypeScript: `Parameter 'e' implicitly has an 'any' type` (line 227)**
     - Since `r` is now `any`, TS can't infer `onresult` callback param type
     - Fix: `r.onresult = (e: any) => {`
     - This build succeeded (READY: `dpl_Ccqa7W4Vve5qWcDGjnNZajfrEUnU`)

   - **Ingest hanging on 2.1GB file**
     - Script read entire file into memory → process killed (OOM)
     - Fix 1: Added `os.path.getsize()` pre-check, skip >5MB before reading
     - This caused chunked ingest to skip it entirely → user asked to split and retry
     - Fix 2: Streaming approach using `f.seek()` + `f.read(CHUNK_SIZE)` for chunked ingest

   - **Chunked ingest crashed on 2.1GB file**
     - Initial chunked script used `content = f.read()` → same OOM issue
     - Fix: Replaced with `f.seek(i * step_bytes); chunk = f.read(CHUNK_SIZE)` streaming

   - **`IMPDOCS 2.zip` and `J•A•S•I.zip` not in original scan**
     - Files were downloaded AFTER the manifest was built
     - Located via `find /home/mega/Downloads -newer /tmp/new_ingest_manifest.txt`
     - Extracted, converted PDFs with pdftotext, ingested 52 files

5. Problem Solving:
   - Cascading TypeScript errors: Vercel shows only the first error per build. Fixed one at a time across 3 builds. Root cause: `SpeechRecognition` browser type not available in Next.js TypeScript environment even with `"lib": ["dom"]` — solution is `as any` with eslint-disable comments.
   - 2.1GB file OOM: Two-stage fix — pre-check file size before reading, then streaming seek-based chunking for the dedicated oversized file processor.
